title: PPIP - Setting persistence when Share Data toggle is ON
scenario: Verify that the Share Data toggle persists its ON state after app restart when enabled.
steps: Enable Share Data (select location permission option on iOS)
Navigate to App Settings > General > Account
Verify the Share Data toggle is ON with correct description
Go to the same settings page (App Settings > General > Account)
Verify the Share Data toggle remains ON
expected: The Share Data toggle remains ON after app restart when the toggle was previously enabled.
